Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem As Admitted Defendant'S Responses To Set Two Of Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant In The Amount Of $885.00
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TENDERTREE INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S Motion To Deem As Admitted Defendant's Responses To Set Two Of Plaintiff's Request For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant In The Amount Of $885.00 is Off calendar. A request for dismissal of the entire action was filed on January 31, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem As Admitted Defendant'S Responses To Set Two Of Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant In The Amount Of $885.00
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion For Issue Sanctions, Evidentiary Sanctions Or To Compel Further Responses To Set One Of Pltf'S Request For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft In The Amount Of $1,022
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alexander T. Jones, Esq. of Jones & Devoy LLP, Tel. 415.615.0879, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

The party stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. At the request of the moving party, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and PLAINTIFF TENDERTREE INC.'s Motion For Issue Sanctions, Evidentiary Sanctions Or To Compel Further Responses To Set One Of Plaintiff's Request For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant In The Amount Of $1,022 is ordered off calendar. The matter has settled. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts Responses To Set One Of Pltf'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Admissioons And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft In The Amount Of $885.00
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on FRI-SEP-20-2013:
Alexander T. Jones, Esq. of Jones & Devoy LLP [415.615.0879] appearing for Plaintiff TENDERTREE INC.; No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff TENDERTREE INC.'S Motion To Compel Defendants Responses to Set One of Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Request for Admissions is Granted, no opposition. Sanctions awarded in amount of $800 against defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Charles O. Geerhart; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
